title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.23 - Live damage previews: Clean Slate and Loosen Up now show '(Hits N times)', and Fate Knocking shows '(Deals N damage)' for its finisher (accounts for the 3 strikes and all damage modifiers), matching base-game card previews.
